title: Airopsis elegans
taxonomy: Airopsis elegans is classified as a species of grass in the family Restionaceae, which is a family of plants commonly known as restios or rushes. This family is part of the order Poales, which includes various types of grasses and sedges. Further classification places Airopsis elegans in the genus Airopsis, which is a group of flowering plants found in southern Africa. The classification of Airopsis elegans is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Poales, Family: Restionaceae, Genus: Airopsis, Species: A. elegans. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Airopsis elegans.
